features: Auto Extreme High Performance Snow Foam Pre Wash 3L

POWERFUL DIRT REMOVER - This high performance formula creates a dense foam that effectively loosens and lifts dirt, road salt, mud, and other contaminants, making your main wash easier and safer. By breaking down dirt before hand washing, this pre wash minimises contact with gritty particles, helping to prevent swirl marks and maintaining a showroom shine.

MAXIMUM CLEANING ACTION - The rich, clinging foam increases dwell time, ensuring a deep and thorough clean. It softens grime, making it easier to rinse away without harsh scrubbing. By breaking down dirt before hand washing, this pre wash minimises contact with gritty particles, helping to prevent swirl marks and maintaining a showroom shine.

EASY TO USE - Designed for use with all major foam lances and pressure washer systems, this snow foam offers a quick and effortless application, making it ideal for car enthusiasts and professionals alike. This snow foam is gentle on waxes, sealants, and ceramic coatings, making it suitable for all car finishes, including matte and metallic paints.

LARGE BOTTLE - With a generous 3 litre capacity, this high concentrate formula provides multiple washes, delivering exceptional value while keeping your car spotless. The ultimate pre wash solution for a deep, safe, and swirl free clean!

The ultimate pre wash solution for a deep, safe, and swirl free clean! Ingredients Non iron surfactants, Anionic surfactants, Aqua, Olefine sulphonate. sodium salt, coco diethanolamine, D limonene. Directions Use only as directed. Rinse heavily soiled bodywork prior to use. Safety Warning Do not alow foam to dry. Keep out of reach of children. See more
